outputs.content:
Create a musically coherent piece with the following identity:
Title: Cosmic Afterglow
Concept: An emotional festival anthem where memory feels like starlight melting into sunrise.
Genres: euphoric hardstyle, dreamwave, cinematic electronic
Mood: uplifting, emotional, vast, melancholic
BPM: 148
Key: G minor
Vocals: minimal male spoken phrases in breakdown only
Imagery: cosmic dawn, glass horizon, neon dust, heart-memory
Structure: atmospheric intro, cinematic build, euphoric drop, reflective break, final elevation
Constraints: avoid generic EDM phrasing, preserve emotional identity, make outputs copy-paste ready
Brand voice: poetic, technical, emotionally charged, never generic
Signature motifs: cosmic scale, heart-pressure emotion, clean technical framing, vast moving landscapes
Avoid: corporate filler, lazy hype words, empty buzzwords
